campaignevents-desc: Waxay bixisaa astaamo loogu talagalay qabanqaabiyeyaasha iyo ka qaybgalayaasha ololaha.
action-campaignevents-email-participants: U dir iimayl ka qaybgalayaasha dhacdada
right-campaignevents-email-participants: u dir iimayl ka qaybgalayaasha dhacdada
action-campaignevents-view-private-parti: arag ka qaybgalayaasha gaarka ah ee dhacdada
right-campaignevents-view-private-partic: Arag ka qaybgalayaasha gaarka ah ee dhacdada
campaignevents-error-invalid-id: Aqoonsiga dhacdadu waa inuu noqdaa tiro dhan oo togan.
campaignevents-error-invalid-title-inter: Sheeg bogga dhacdada ee wiki ga maxalliga ah.
campaignevents-error-page-not-found: Ma jiro bog dhacdo oo leh magacan.
campaignevents-error-page-namespace-not-: Bogga dhacdadu waa inuu ku jiraa mid ka mid ah meel magacyada la oggol yahay
campaignevents-error-page-with-section: Bogga dhacdadu waa inuusan ka koobnaan magaca qayb ah.
campaignevents-error-invalid-wikis: Aqoonsiyada wiki ee soo socda lama aqoonsana: $1.
campaignevents-error-invalid-chat-url: Geli URL wada sheekeysi oo sax ah.
campaignevents-error-trackingtool-withou: Bixi aqoonsiga dhacdada ee ku jira qalabka raadraaca la bixiyay.
campaignevents-error-invalid-trackingtoo: Bixi aqoonsi sax ah oo qalabka raadraaca ah
campaignevents-error-invalid-status: Sheeg in dhacdadu furan tahay ama xiran tahay.
campaignevents-error-invalid-start: Waqtiga bilowga dhacdadu waa mid aan sax ahayn.
campaignevents-error-start-past: Geli waqti bilow ah oo mustaqbalka ah.
campaignevents-error-invalid-end: Waqtiga dhammaadka dhacdadu waa mid aan sax ahayn.
campaignevents-error-start-after-end: Geli taariikh dhammaad ah oo ka dambaysa taariikhda bilowga.
campaignevents-error-invalid-dashboard-u: URL-ka Dashboard-ka la bixiyay ma aha qaabka saxda ah. URL-ku waa inuu ahaadaa qaabkan: $1/[Magaca Hay'adda]/[Cinwaanka Barnaamijka]. Tusaale ahaan: $1/Example_Organization/Example_Event_Title.
campaignevents-error-invalid-meeting-url: Geli URL kulan dhacdo oo sax ah.
campaignevents-error-meeting-url-not-onl: URL-ka kulanka lama cayimi karo haddii dhacdadu aysan ahayn mid onlayn ah.
campaignevents-error-countryoraddress-no: Dalka iyo cinwaanka kulanka lama cayimi karo haddii dhacdadu aysan ahayn mid fool ka fool ah.
campaignevents-edit-form-details-subtitl: Bixi macluumaad guud oo ku saabsan dhacdada aad qabanqaabinayso
campaignevents-edit-field-page-help: Bogga dhacdadu wuxuu ka kooban yahay macluumaad ku saabsan dhacdadaada. Dadku waxay iska diiwaangelin karaan ka qaybgalayaal ahaan bogga dhacdada.
campaignevents-edit-field-organizers-hel: Ku dar magaca isticmaalaha qabanqaabiyeyaasha kale si aad u siiso oggolaansho ay ku maamulaan dhacdadan.
campaignevents-edit-field-organizers-cre: Kani waa abuuraha dhacdada, qabanqaabiyeyaasha kale kama saari karaan isticmaalahan.
campaignevents-edit-field-wiki-type: Dhacdadan ma diiradda saartaa wikiyada gaar ah?
campaignevents-edit-field-wiki-type-all: Haa (waxay u furan tahay dhammaan wikiyada)
campaignevents-edit-field-wikis-help: Haddii dhacdadaadu ka dhacayso wikis gaar ah, fadlan halkan ku qor. Tani waxay ka caawisaa dadka inay go'aansadaan dhacdooyinka ay ka qaybgalayaan, waxayna sidoo kale ka caawisaa falanqaynta xogta.
campaignevents-edit-field-tracking-tools: Magacyada isticmaalayaasha ka qaybgalayaasha si guud loo diiwaangeliyay waxaa si toos ah loogu diri doonaa Dashboard-ka. Qalabkani wuxuu kaa caawinayaa inaad la socoto wax ku biirinta ka qaybgalayaasha oo aad cabbirto saameynta dhacdada ololahaaga. [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Programs_%26_Events_Dashboard Wax badan ka baro].
Geli URL-ka Dashboard-ka Barnaamijyada & Dhacdooyinka ee dhacdadaada
campaignevents-edit-field-type-online-an: Dhacdo onlayn ah iyo fool ka fool ah
campaignevents-edit-field-chat-url-help: Haddii aad leedahay koox wada sheekeysi onlayn ah oo loogu talagalay ka qaybgalayaasha dhacdadan, waxaad halkan ku dari kartaa xiriirka casuumadda. Ka qaybgalayaashu waxay awoodi doonaan inay arkaan xiriirka casuumadda ka dib marka ay isdiiwaangeliyaan.
campaignevents-edit-field-event-is-test: Tani ma tahay dhacdo toos ah mise tijaabo ah?
campaignevents-edit-field-topics-help: Waxaad ku dari kartaa ugu badnaan {{PLURAL:$1|hal mowduuc|$1 mowduucyo}}.
campaignevents-edit-form-questions-intro: Dooro mid ka mid ah su'aalahan soo socda si ay ka qaybgalayaashu uga jawaabaan marka ay iska diiwaangelinayaan dhacdada.
campaignevents-edit-form-questions-expla: Inta ay socoto dhacdadu, waxaad heli kartaa jawaabaha ka qaybgalayaasha gaarka ah ee su'aalaha aan ku jirin Macluumaadka Aqoonsiga Shakhsiyeed (PII). Marka ay dhacdadu dhammaato, jawaabaha dhammaan su'aalaha waa la heli doonaa (qaab isku dar ah oo keliya), jawaabaha gaarka ahna waa la tirtiri doonaa.
campaignevents-edit-form-questions-non-p: Su'aalaha Macluumaadka Aan Aqoonsiga Shakhsiyeed Lahayn (aan ahayn-PII)
campaignevents-edit-form-questions-pii-n: Si aad u aragto jawaabaha la isku daray ee ka qaybgalayaasha ee ay ku jiraan macluumaad shakhsiyeed, waxaa lagaa codsan doonaa inaad si taxaddar leh ula tacaasho macluumaadka ka qaybgalayaasha, oo ay ku jiraan macluumaadka aqoonsiga shakhsiyeed ee ka qaybgalayaasha, ee la ururiyay inta lagu jiro diiwaangelinta dhacdada.
campaignevents-edit-form-notice: Kaliya magacyada isticmaalayaasha ayaa laga ururin doonaa ka qaybgalayaasha inta lagu jiro diiwaangelinta. [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Extension:CampaignEvents/Registration Wax badan ka baro].
campaignevents-edit-invalid-id: Bixi aqoonsi dhacdo oo sax ah.
campaignevents-edit-no-event-id: Boggan ma laha aqoonsi dhacdo oo sax ah. Geli aqoonsi dhacdo oo sax ah ama ka eeg dhammaan dhacdooyinka ku jira [[Special:AllEvents|liiska iskaashiga]].
campaignevents-edit-page-nonlocal: Fadlan '''[$1 wax ka beddel diiwaangelinta dhacdadaada ee $2]''', wiki-ga halkaas oo dhacdada lagu abuuray.
campaignevents-edit-need-central-account: Waxaad u baahan tahay akoonka isticmaalaha ee dhexe si aad u awoodsiiso ama u beddesho diiwaangelinta dhacdada.
campaignevents-edit-organizers-not-allow: $2 {{PLURAL:$1|meeshan|ma laha}} fasaxyada loo baahan yahay si uu u noqdo {{PLURAL:$1|abaabuule|abaabulayaal}}.
campaignevents-edit-no-organizers: Dhacdooyinku waxay u baahan yihiin inay lahaadaan ugu yaraan hal abaabuule. Fadlan ku dar abaabuule ama tirtir dhacdada haddii aan loo baahnayn.
campaignevents-edit-removed-creator: Ma saari kartid $1 sababtoo ah {{GENDER:$1|isticmaalahan}} ayaa ah naqshadeeyaha dhacdada
campaignevents-edit-no-creator: Waxaad u baahan tahay inaad isku darto ahaan abaabuule marka aad markii ugu horreysay awoodsiiso diiwaangelinta dhacdada.
campaignevents-edit-too-many-organizers: Ma ku dari kartid wax ka badan $1 {{PLURAL:$1|abaabuule|abaabulayaal}}.
campaignevents-edit-organizer-need-centr: {{PLURAL:$1|Isticmaalaha|Isticmaalayaasha}} soo socda ma laha akoon isticmaale oo dhexe, mana aha kuwo ku biiri kara ahaan {{PLURAL:$1|abaabuule|abaabulayaal}}: $2.
campaignevents-edit-invalid-username: "$1" ma aha magac isticmaale oo sax ah.
campaignevents-error-page-already-regist: Bogga dhacdada la bixiyay wuxuu horey u leeyahay diiwaangalin la xiriirta.
Ma dhammaystiri kartid ficilkan sababtoo ah diiwaangelinta dhacdada waa laga tirtiray boggan dhacdada.
campaignevents-edit-not-allowed-registra: Ikuma haysatid ogolaansho inaad wax ka beddesho diiwaangelinta dhacdadan.
campaignevents-enable-registration-not-a: Adigu ma haysatid ogolaansho inaad awoodsiiso diiwaangelinta dhacdada ee bogga dhacdada la bixiyay.
campaignevents-register-error-no-event-i: Boggan ma laha aqoonsi dhacdo oo sax ah. Geli aqoonsi dhacdo oo sax ah ama ka daawo dhammaan dhacdooyinka Liiska Iskaashiga.
campaignevents-unregister-confirmation-t: Xaqiiji inaad rabto inaad ka baxdo diiwaanka munaasabaddan adoo isticmaalaya badhanka "{{int:campaignevents-unregister-confirmation-btn}}".
campaignevents-delete-not-allowed-regist: Adigu ma haysatid ogolaansho inaad tirtirto diiwaangelinta munaasabaddan.
campaignevents-register-not-allowed: Adigu ma haysatid ogolaansho inaad isku diiwaangeliso munaasabadaha.
campaignevents-register-event-past: Muddada diiwaangelinta dhacdadan hore ayay u dhammaatay.
campaignevents-register-need-central-acc: Waxaad u baahan tahay akoon isticmaale oo dhexe si aad isu diiwaangeliso dhacdooyinka.
campaignevents-register-answers-aggregat: Ma bixin kartid jawaabo sababtoo ah kuwii aad hore u bixisay hore ayaa loo isku daray loona tirtiray.
campaignevents-unregister-need-central-a: Waxaad u baahan tahay akoon isticmaale oo dhexe si aad u baajiso diiwaangelintaada dhacdada.
campaignevents-myevents-need-central-acc: Waxaad u baahan tahay akoon isticmaale oo dhexe si aad u aragto liiska dhacdooyinkaaga.
campaignevents-eventslist-delete-dialog-: Waxaad lumin doontaa dhammaan xogta diiwaangelinta, laakiin bogga dhacdada lama tirtiri doono.
campaignevents-delete-error-already-dele: Diiwaangelintan dhacdada hore ayaa loo tirtiray.
campaignevents-delete-confirmation-text: Xaqiiji inaad rabto inaad tirtirto diiwaangelintan dhacdada adigoo isticmaalaya badhanka "{{int:campaignevents-delete-submit-btn}}". Tallaabadan lama soo celin karo.
campaignevents-register-registration-del: Ma iska diiwaangelin kartid dhacdadan sababtoo ah waa la tirtiray.
campaignevents-unregister-registration-d: Ma baajin kartid diiwaangelintaada dhacdada sababtoo ah waa la tirtiray.
campaignevents-eventpage-header-register: Waxaad si gaar ah isu diiwaangelisay!
campaignevents-eventpage-register-notifi: Booqo [[Special:AllEvents|liiska iskaashiga]] si aad u hesho dhacdooyin iyo bulshooyin badan.
campaignevents-eventpage-unregister-conf: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad joojiso diiwaangelintaada?
campaignevents-eventpage-registration-en: Diiwaangelinta waa la awoodsiiyay. Ka qaybgalayaashu hadda waxay iska diiwaangelin karaan boggaaga dhacdada.
campaignevents-eventpage-enableheader-ev: Bogga dhacdada: Awood geli diiwaangelinta si ay ka qaybgalayaashu si toos ah uga diiwaangelin karaan dhacdadaada bogga.
campaignevents-eventpage-enable-registra: Tani waxay u oggolaanaysaa ka qaybgalayaasha inay si toos ah uga diiwaangashan karaan imaanshaha dhacdadaada boggan.
campaignevents-event-details-header-ques: Jawaabaha ka qaybgalayaasha gaarka ah ee lagu muujiyay jadwalka waxaa la isku dari doonaa ka dibna waa la tirtiri doonaa, 90 maalmood kadib marka la gudbiyo ama marka ay dhacdadu dhammaato (midka soo horreeya). Jawaabaha la isku daray waxaa laga heli doonaa tab-ka "{{int:campaignevents-event-details-tab-stats}}", kaas oo muuqan doona kadib marka ay dhacdadu dhammaato.
campaignevents-event-details-participant: $1 {{PLURAL:$1|ka qaybgalaha|ka qaybgalayaasha}} ayaa si gaar ah isu diiwaangeliyay.
campaignevents-event-details-tracking-to: Magacyada isticmaalayaasha ka qaybgalayaasha ee ku jira Dashboard-ka waa la cusboonaysiiyay
Lama awoodin in magacyada isticmaalayaasha qaar ka mid ah ka qaybgalayaasha lagu cusboonaysiiyo Dashboard-ka
campaignevents-event-details-chat-link-n: Ma jiro koox wada sheekeysi oo diyaar u ah dhacdadan.
campaignevents-event-details-wikis-all: Dhacdadan waxay u furan tahay dhammaan wikiyada.
campaignevents-event-details-register-pr: Waxaad u baahan tahay inaad isdiiwaangeliso si aad u aragto macluumaadkan
campaignevents-event-details-message-all: Fariin u dir dhammaan ka qaybgalayaasha
campaignevents-event-details-no-organize: Si aad fariin ugu dirto ka qaybgalayaasha, waxaad u baahan tahay cinwaan iimayl oo ku jira akoonkaaga. [[Special:ChangeEmail|Ku dar iimayl]].
campaignevents-event-details-remove-part: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad ka saarto {{PLURAL:$1|ka qaybgalaha la doortay|ka qaybgalayaasha la doortay}}?
campaignevents-event-details-private-par: {{GENDER:$1|Ka qaybgalaha ayaa si gaar ah isu diiwaangeliyay}}
campaignevents-event-details-no-particip: Magacyada isticmaalayaasha ka qaybgalayaasha waxay halkan ka soo muuqan doonaan marka ay isdiiwaangeliyaan
campaignevents-event-details-invalid-id: Bixi aqoonsi dhacdo oo sax ah.
campaignevents-event-details-remove-all-: Dhammaan ka qaybgalayaasha waa laga saaray
campaignevents-unregister-participants-p: Looma oggola inaad ka saarto ka qaybgalayaasha
campaignevents-unregister-participants-r: Ma ka saari kartid ka qaybgalayaasha dhacdadan sababtoo ah waa la tirtiray.
campaignevents-event-details-remove-part: Waxaa dhacay qalad markii la isku dayayay in laga saaro {{PLURAL:$1|ka qaybgalaha|ka qaybgalayaasha}}
campaignevents-event-details-organizers-: Waxaad u baahan tahay inaad awood geliso JavaScript si aad u aragto liiska buuxa ee qabanqaabiyeyaasha.
campaignevents-tracking-tool-http-error: Khalad aan la garanayn ayaa dhacay intii la isku dayayay in la farsameeyo qalabka raadraaca.
campaignevents-tracking-tool-wikiedu-con: Lama xiriiri karo $1 sababtoo ah cilad ku timid habaynta goobta.
campaignevents-tracking-tool-wikiedu-not: Mid ka mid ah qabanqaabiyeyaasha dhacdadan ma aha fududeeye koorsada $1.
campaignevents-tracking-tool-wikiedu-alr: Koorsada $1 hore ayay u leedahay ka qaybgalayaal, sidaas darteed laguma xiriirin karo dhacdadan.
Koorsada $1 hore ayaa loogu xiray dhacdo, mana lagu xiriirin karo mar kale.
campaignevents-tracking-tool-wikiedu-not: Koorsada $1 kuma xirna dhacdadan, sidaas darteed lama waafajin karo.
campaignevents-registration-confirmation: Diiwaangelin gaar ah: Magacaaga isticmaalaha ee ku jira liiska ka qaybgalayaasha waxaa arki kara oo keliya qabanqaabiyeyaasha dhacdada iyo xubnaha {{PLURAL:$2|kooxda isticmaalayaasha|kooxaha isticmaalayaasha}} soo socda: $1. Wax ku biirintaada inta ay socoto dhacdadu waxaa laga yaabaa in qabanqaabiyeyaashu ka saaraan [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Programs_%26_Events_Dashboard Dashboard-ka Barnaamijyada & Dhacdooyinka] ama qalabyo kale oo lagu ururiyo tirakoobka.

Diiwaangelin gaar ah: Magacaaga isticmaalaha ee ku jira liiska ka qaybgalayaasha waxaa arki kara oo keliya qabanqaabiyeyaasha dhacdada. Wax ku biirintaada inta ay socoto dhacdadu waxaa laga yaabaa in qabanqaabiyeyaashu ka saaraan [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Programs_%26_Events_Dashboard Dashboard-ka Barnaamijyada & Dhacdooyinka] ama qalabyo kale oo lagu ururiyo tirakoobka.

Diiwaangelin dadweyne: Magacaaga isticmaalaha ku muuji liiska dadweynaha ee ka qaybgalayaasha. Wax ku biirintaada inta ay socoto dhacdadu waxaa laga yaabaa in qabanqaabiyeyaashu ku daraan [https://meta.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Programs_%26_Events_Dashboard Dashboard-ka Barnaamijyada & Dhacdooyinka] ama qalabyo kale oo lagu ururiyo tirakoobka.
echo-pref-tooltip-campaign-events-notifi: I ogeysii marka aan iska diiwaangeliyo dhacdo isticmaasha qalabka Diiwaangelinta Dhacdooyinka.
campaignevents-notification-registration: Waad ku mahadsan tahay inaad isu diiwaangelisay $1.
Ku biir $1 si aad ula xiriirto ka qaybgalayaasha kale oo aad uga hesho warar dheeraad ah qabanqaabiyeyaasha.
Booqo [[Special:AllEvents|liiska iskaashiga]] si aad uga hesho dhacdooyin iyo bulshooyin badan oo ku jira wikiyada.
campaignevents-event-details-email-messa: Nuxurka qoraalka cad ee fariintaada iimaylka, waa inuu ahaadaa ugu yaraan 10 xaraf
campaignevents-event-details-email-ccme-: Iigu soo dir nuqul ka mid ah fariintayda iimayl ahaan
campaignevents-email-select-participant-: Fadlan dooro qaatayaal iimayl oo sax ah
campaignevents-email-participants-missin: Qaar ka mid ah ka qaybgalayaasha la doortay kuma laha cinwaan iimayl akoonkooda, mana heli doonaan iimaylkaaga. Waxaad fariin ugu diri kartaa adigoo gujinaya magacyadooda isticmaalaha oo aad aadaya boggooda wada hadalka isticmaalaha.
campaignevents-email-footer: Iimaylkan waxaa {{GENDER:$1|diray}} $1 kuna socday {{GENDER:$2|$2}}, oo ah ka qaybgalaha diiwaangashan ee dhacdadan soo socota: $3. Haddii {{GENDER:$2|aad}} uga jawaabto iimaylkan, iimaylka {{GENDER:$2|aad}} wuxuu si toos ah ugu diri doonaa {{GENDER:$1|diraha asalka ah}}, taasoo {{GENDER:$2|cinwaankaaga iimaylka}} u muujinaysa {{GENDER:$1|qofkaas}}.
campaignevents-email-footer-collaboratio: Booqo liiska iskaashiga si aad uga hesho dhacdooyin iyo bulshooyin badan oo ku jira wikiyada: $1
campaignevents-email-self-subject: Nuqul ka mid ah fariintaada loo diray ka qaybgalayaasha $1
campaignevents-register-questions-label-: Xogtan waxaa lala wadaagi doonaa qabanqaabiyayaasha munaasabadda oo kaliya.
campaignevents-register-question-confide: Sidee ayaad ugu kalsoon tahay ka qayb qaadashada mashaariicda Wikimedia ee ku lug leh dhacdadan? (ikhtiyaari)
Weligay hore ugama aanan qayb qaadan mashruuc Wikimedia ah
Waxaan leeyahay xoogaa khibrad ah, laakiin ma dareemayo kalsooni
Waxaan leeyahay xoogaa khibrad ah, waxaanan dareemayaa kalsooni aan wax ku biiriyo, laakiin waxaan jeclaan lahaa inaan wax badan barto
Waxaan ku kalsoonahay inaan wax ku biirin karo anigoon u baahnayn wax taageero ah
campaignevents-register-question-affilia: Ma xubin ka tahay mid ka mid ah ururrada xiriirka la leh Wikimedia (cutubyo, kooxo isticmaalayaal, ururro mawduuc gaar ah)? (ikhtiyaari)
campaignevents-register-question-confide: Sidee ayaad ugu kalsoon tahay ka qayb qaadashada mashaariicda Wikimedia ee ku lug leh dhacdadan?

campaignevents-register-retention-base: Jawaabahaaga waa la isku dari doonaa ka dibna waa la tirtiri doonaa 90 maalmood kadib marka la gudbiyo ama marka ay dhacdadu dhammaato, midka soo horreeya. Waxaad wax ka beddeli kartaa jawaabaha wakhti kasta ka hor intaas. Marka la tirtiro, lama beddeli karo, dib loogama jawaabi karo, lamana soo ceshan karo.
campaignevents-register-retention-days: Waqtiga ka haray ilaa jawaabahaaga la isku darayo oo la tirtirayo waa: $1 {{PLURAL:$1|maalin|maalmood}}.
campaignevents-register-retention-hours: Waqtiga ka haray ilaa jawaabahaaga la isku darayo oo la tirtirayo waa: in ka yar 24 saacadood.
campaignevents-eventpage-register-dialog: Macluumaadkan waxaa lala wadaagi doonaa oo keliya qabanqaabiyeyaasha dhacdada.

campaignevents-register-invalid-answer: Jawaab aan sax ahayn oo ku saabsan su'aasha $1
campaignevents-details-stats-no-response: Dhacdadani ma laha jawaabo ka yimid ka qaybgalayaasha oo la isku dari karo.
campaignevents-details-stats-not-ready: Jawaabaha ka qaybgalayaasha waa la isku dari doonaa waxaana halkan lagu soo bandhigi doonaa wax yar kadib.
campaignevents-details-stats-section-non: Su'aalaha Macluumaadka Aan Aqoonsiga Shakhsiyeed Lahayn (aan ahayn-PII)
campaignevents-details-stats-not-enough-: Su'aashan waxay heshay wax ka yar $1 oo ah {{PLURAL:$1|jawaab|jawaabo}} guud ahaan.
campaignevents-event-dates-cannot-be-cha: Dhacdadu way dhammaatay, sidaas darteed ma beddeli kartid taariikhaha dhacdada si ay u noqdaan taariikho mustaqbalka ah. Xaddidaaddan waxay ilaalinaysaa xogta ka qaybgalayaasha.
campaignevents-individual-stats-label-me: Sidee ayaad ugu kalsoon tahay ka qayb qaadashada mashaariicda Wikimedia ee ku lug leh dhacdadan?
Ma xubin ka tahay mid ka mid ah ururrada xiriirka la leh Wikimedia (cutubyo, kooxo isticmaalayaal, ururro mawduuc gaar ah)?
campaignevents-edit-field-clickwrap-chec: Boggan wuxuu ka kooban yahay jawaabaha la isku daray ee ka qaybgalayaasha ee su'aalaha foomka diiwaangelinta.
Si aad u aragto jawaabaha la isku daray ee ka qaybgalayaasha ee ay ku jiraan macluumaad shaqsiyeed, waa inaad aqbashaa kuwa soo socda:

Waxaan oggolahay inaan si taxaddar leh ula dhaqmo macluumaadka ka qaybgalayaasha, oo ay ku jirto macluumaadka qofka lagu aqoonsan karo ee ka qaybgalayaasha, kaas oo la ururiyey inta lagu jiro diiwaangelinta dhacdada.
campaignevents-participant-question-have: Jawaabaha {{GENDER:$1|ka qaybgalahan}} waa la isku daray oo waa la tirtiray
campaignevents-warning-change-event-end-: Haddii aad beddesho taariikhda dhammaadka oo aad u dhigto taariikh hore, dhacdada waa la xiri doonaa, waxaana heli doontaa soo koobid jawaabaha ka qaybgalayaasha. Ficilkan lama celin karo. Tani waxay khusaysaa oo keliya haddii ka qaybgalayaashu bixiyeen jawaabo ku saabsan su'aalaha ka qaybgalayaasha.
campaignevents-event-details-participant: Jawaabaha ka qaybgalayaasha ee shaqsiyaadka ah waa la tirtiray, jawaabaha la isku darayna waxaa laga heli karaa [$1 {{int:campaignevents-event-details-tab-stats}}].
campaignevents-register-page-nonlocal: Fadlan '''[$1 dhammaystir diiwaangelintaada dhacdada ee $2]''', oo ah wiki-ga lagu abuuray dhacdada.
campaignevents-delete-registration-page-: Fadlan '''[$1 tirtir diiwaangelintaada dhacdada ee $2]''', oo ah wiki-ga lagu abuuray dhacdada.
campaignevents-event-details-page-nonloc: Waxaad hadda daawanaysaa nooc xaddidan oo boggan ah. Fadlan [$1 booqo boggan ee $2], oo ah wiki-ga lagu abuuray dhacdada, si aad u hesho faahfaahinta buuxda ee dhacdada iyo astaamo dheeraad ah.
campaignevents-event-details-sensitive-d: Akoonkaaga waa la xannibay. Ma lihid oggolaansho aad tan ku gasho.
campaignevents-generateinvitationlist-ar: Geli magacyada ilaa $1 {{PLURAL:$1|maqaal|maqaalo}} oo ka hadlaya mawduucyada dhacdadaada. Maqaal kasta waa inuu ku yaallaa sadar cusub. Kadib, liiska ka qaybqaataayaasha ayaa la diyaarin doonaa iyadoo lagu salaynayo maqaallada aad ku dartay.
campaignevents-invitation-list-disabled: Wiki-gan ma laha liisaska casuumaadaha oo la hawlgeliyey.
campaignevents-invitation-list-not-allow: Looma oggola inaad isticmaasho liisaska casuumaadaha.
campaignevents-myinvitationslist-empty-t: Soo hel ka qaybgalayaal cusub oo mashruucaaga ama dhacdadaada ah. Bixi liis maqaalo ah oo ka hadlaya mawduucyada hawshaada. Kadib, waxaad heli doontaa liis casuumaad oo tafatirayaal ah kuwaas oo laga yaabo inay xiisaynayaan ku biirista mashruucaaga ama dhacdadaada.
campaignevents-invitation-list-error-emp: Bixi magac loogu talagalay liiska casuumaadda.
campaignevents-invitation-list-error-inv: Geli bog dhacdo oo isticmaala Diiwaangelinta Dhacdooyinka.
campaignevents-invitation-list-error-eve: Dhacdadani way dhammaatay. Geli dhacdo firfircoon.
campaignevents-invitation-list-error-not: Geli bog dhacdo oo ku taxaya adiga inaad tahay qabanqaabiye.
campaignevents-worklist-error-empty: Geli ugu yaraan hal cinwaan maqaal.
campaignevents-worklist-error-too-large: Waxaad gelisay $1 {{PLURAL:$1|maqaal|maqaalo}}. Fadlan geli inta u dhaxaysa 1 iyo $2 {{PLURAL:$2|maqaalo}}.
campaignevents-worklist-error-invalid-ti:
{{PLURAL:$1|Maqaalka soo socda wuxuu leeyahay cinwaan aan sax ahayn|Maqaallada soo socda waxay leeyihiin cinwaanno aan sax ahayn}}. Fadlan sax {{PLURAL:$1|cinwaankaas|cinwaannadaas}} oo mar kale isku day.
$2
campaignevents-worklist-error-nonexisten:
{{PLURAL:$1|Maqaalka soo socda lama helin|Maqaallada soo socda lama helin}}. Fadlan hubi {{PLURAL:$1|cinwaanka|cinwaannada}} oo mar kale isku day.
$2
campaignevents-worklist-error-titles-not:
{{PLURAL:$1|Maqaalka soo socda kuma jiro|Maqaallada soo socda kuma jiraan}} magaca guud ee. Fadlan geli maqaallo ku jira magaca guud oo keliya.
$2
campaignevents-invitation-list-processin: Liiska tafatirayaasha aad casuumayso ayaa la diyaarinayaa. Dib u cusboonaysii bogga 5–10 daqiiqo gudahood si aad u aragto liiska casuumaadahaaga.
campaignevents-invitation-list-invalid-i: Bixi aqoonsi sax ah oo liiska casuumaadda ah. [[Special:MyInvitationLists|Arag liisaskaaga casuumaadaha]].
campaignevents-invitation-list-does-not-: Liiskan casuumaadda ah ma jiro. [[Special:MyInvitationLists|Arag liisaskaaga casuumaadaha]].
campaignevents-invitation-list-not-creat: Ma lihid oggolaansho aad ku aragto liiskan casuumaadda sababtoo ah adiga ma aadan abuurin. [[Special:MyInvitationLists|Arag liisaskaaga casuumaadaha]].
campaignevents-invitation-list-nonlocal: Fadlan '''[$1 ka eeg liiskan casuumaadda ee $2]''', oo ah wiki-ga lagu sameeyay.
campaignevents-invitation-list-intro: Waxaa la helay $1 {{PLURAL:$1|tafatire|tafatirayaal}}, iyadoo lagu salaynayo shuruudahan soo socda: tirada baytyada ay ku biiriyeen maqaalada, tirada wax ka beddellada ay ku sameeyeen maqaalada, tirada guud ee wax ka beddelladooda ee wikis-ka, iyo sida dhowaan ay wax uga beddeleen wikiyada.
campaignevents-invitationlist-no-editors: Ma jiro tafatire buuxiya [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Extension:CampaignEvents/Invitation_lists shuruudaha liiska casuumaadda] ee ka yimid liiska maqaaladaada. Waxaad [[Special:GenerateInvitationList|abuuri kartaa liis casuumaad cusub]] oo leh liis maqaalo cusub.
campaignevents-invitationlist-highly-rec: Aad ayaa loogu talinayaa in la casuumo
Tafatirayaashan waxay heleen darajo sare oo liiska casuumaadda ah, sidaas darteed waxay u badan tahay inay xiisaynayaan ku biirista hawshaada.
campaignevents-invitationlist-recommende: Waxaa lagu talinayaa in la casuumo
Tafatirayaashan waxay heleen darajo dhexdhexaad ah oo liiska casuumaadda ah, laakiin weli waxaa dhici karta inay xiisaynayaan ku biirista hawshaada.
campaignevents-event-details-footer: Booqo [[Special:AllEvents|liiska iskaashiga]] si aad uga hesho dhacdooyin iyo bulshooyin badan.
campaignevents-allevents-label-include-a: Ku dar dhacdooyinka u furan dhammaan wikiyada
campaignevents-eventslist-all-wikis: Dhacdadani waxay u furan tahay dhammaan wikiyada.
campaignevents-allevents-label-upcoming-: Dhacdooyinka soo socda: Dhacdooyinka bilaabanaya inta lagu jiro taariikhaha la doortay
campaignevents-allevents-label-ongoing-e: Dhacdooyinka socda: Dhacdooyinka bilaabmay ka hor laakiin sii socda inta lagu jiro taariikhaha la doortay
campaignevents-allevents-transclusion-mo: Soo hel dhacdooyin iyo bulshooyin badan
communityconfiguration-campaignevents-ca: Magacyada meelaha dhacdooyinka ee saxda ah
